parsed.final_response: You're feeling really stuck in this loop of bills and deadlines, and it's like no matter how hard you try, you can't seem to get ahead. Treating your tasks like a recipe, slicing them into smaller portions, might be a good way to make them feel more manageable. What do you think is the smallest, most manageable task you could tackle first, to help you build some momentum?
